calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-25-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-30-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Brett Pedersen, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Samuel Meritt College.
Karrie Henry, Student Loan Coordinator for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Samuel C. Carpenter.
Default was entered against defendant on January 30, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Samuel Merritt College, and against the Defaulted Defendant Samuel C. Carpenter as follows:

Damages/Principal - $13,353.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $24,607.93.
Attorney Fees - $5,627.28.
Late Fees - $128.00.
Costs - $665.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $44,381.21.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
